actor_relation_claims.role_detail: express third party beneficiary of the Pamplona commitment letter

event_claims.description: The merger agreement does not contain a financing condition to the obligations of the Buyer Entities or Merger Subsidiary.
event_claims.quote_text: The merger agreement does not contain any condition to the obligations of the Buyer Entities or Merger Subsidiary relating to the receipt of financing by the Buyer Entities.

event_claims.description: Parent made available an aggregate of $594 million of capital for funding the merger consideration, committed pursuant to the Pamplona commitment letter.
event_claims.quote_text:
Parent has made available

for purposes of funding the merger consideration an aggregate of $594 million of capital (the Pamplona commitment amount), which is committed pursuant to the Pamplona commitment letter delivered to the Buyer Entities by Pamplona Capital Partners III, L.P. dated as of October 14, 2013.

event_claims.description: Pamplona's obligation to fund the closing funding obligations is conditioned upon satisfaction or waiver of Parent and Merger Subsidiary closing conditions or specific performance relief.
event_claims.quote_text: The obligation of Pamplona to fund the closing funding obligations is conditioned upon (a) all conditions to the obligations of Parent and Merger Subsidiary set forth in the merger agreement having been satisfied or waived as of the date of the closing pursuant to the terms of the merger agreement (other than those conditions that by their nature cannot be satisfied until the closing and that would be satisfied assuming the Closing would occur); or (b) Mac-Gray obtaining, as contemplated in the merger agreement, an award of specific performance by a court of competent jurisdiction in a final non-appealable judgment requiring Parent to effect the closing, or other equitable remedy to specifically enforce the obligations of Parent and Merger Subsidiary to effect the closing on the terms set forth in the merger agreement.

event_claims.description: Mac-Gray may specifically enforce the Pamplona commitment letter to cause Pamplona to fund the Pamplona commitment amount to permit closing of the merger.
event_claims.quote_text: specifically enforcing the provisions of the Pamplona commitment letter to cause Pamplona to fund the Pamplona commitment amount to permit the closing of the merger to occur subject to and in accordance with the terms and conditions of the merger agreement and the Pamplona commitment letter.
